text:
Hope Of Mankind is the 7th character image song for the Attack on Titan anime. It is the character image song of Erwin Smith, and is sung by his voice actor, . It is an arrangement of the song theDOGS.

The song was composed by both and Kohta Yamamoto, and arranged solely by Yamamoto.
